package_lock.boundary: Package lock is derived from the Forge source manifest and verified by dx-check for file/cache integrity.

cache.archive_manifest_caveat: Archived cache manifests are retained under .dx/forge/cache-archive for rollback review only and never count toward active package totals.

safety_archive.boundary: Safety/archive coverage proves local rollback receipts and cache-backed restore inputs; it does not claim remote rollback automation.

vcs_status.boundary: This www-template VCS receipt is a deterministic tracked-file inventory over package, source, and media surfaces; it is not a full Forge commit graph, branch model, or remote collaboration proof.

media_status.boundary: WWW template proves a real media status, cache copy, chunk map, and restore receipt for one SVG asset. MP4/EXR/UAsset/CSP structured chunkers remain crate-level partial proof until fixture-backed launch receipts exist.

warnings: Remote object HEAD health is fixture-backed for the WWW template; no live R2/S3 request was performed.
Required package manifest and content blob checks are not measured, so remote install remains blocked.
next_actions: Keep R2/S3 install dry-run-only until an operator approves read-only HEAD checks.
After approval, write a measured dx.forge.remote_object_head_health receipt before enabling remote install.
remote_object_head_health.boundary: WWW template exposes the R2/S3 HEAD-health contract for Zed and dx-check without claiming any live network read, blob fetch, or remote install.
